caption: A man with a beard, wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with gold "BOSS TALK" text and a logo that says "LEGACY", sits at a desk in a studio setting. He is laughing and smiling, leaning slightly forward with his hands resting on the table, showcasing a gold watch on his wrist. In front of him is a professional broadcast microphone on a swivel arm. The background features a white wall with repeating logos that say "UNION HUSTLE" beneath five stars, and a blue banner at the top that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right sits a black mug with "BOSS TALK" written on it. As the sequence progresses, the man's expression shifts from a broad smile to deep laughter, closing his eyes and tilting his head slightly as he reacts to something.
